channel.title: BBC News
channel.copyright: Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.

item.title: 'Affordability is the biggest thing' - Conservatives mixed on economy under Trump
item.description: Conservatives gathered at the annual CPAC conference in Texas were mixed when asked about their feelings on the current economy.

item.title: Trump orders airport security paid as travellers face hours-long queues
item.description: While Trump's order could provide temporary relief, it is unclear what authority the White House could invoke for such a move.

item.title: US prosecutors argue Maduro 'plundered' Venezuelan wealth in court battle over legal fees
item.description: A judge said the right to defence was paramount as prosecutors argued the couple should not be able to use Venezuelan funds to pay lawyers.

item.title: Trump's signature to appear on US dollars in first for sitting president
item.description: The US president's signature will appear on new paper currency alongside Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent.

item.title: Oscars moving to a new home outside Hollywood
item.description: The centrally located Peacock Theater in Los Angeles will host the 101st Academy Awards ceremony when it begins streaming on YouTube in 2029.

item.title: Judge rejects Pentagon's attempt to 'cripple' Anthropic
item.description: A federal judge told the government it could not immediately enforce a ban on Anthropic’s tools.

item.title: Trump's Iran strategy is to pursue two off-ramps at once
item.description: The White House insists the president is dictating events, but even some Republicans are frustrated by mixed messaging about his war aims.

item.title: Tearful Savannah Guthrie blames herself for mother's kidnapping
item.description: The US television presenter describes the aftermath of her mother's abduction and worries her fame is to blame.

item.title: Air Canada CEO 'deeply saddened' his English-only message distracted from victims of crash
item.description: Michael Rousseau has faced calls to resign for not speaking French in his message after the LaGuardia crash, which killed two Air Canada pilots.

item.title: Campaigners welcome Meta and YouTube's defeat in landmark social media addiction trial
item.description: A woman has been awarded $6m in a verdict that could have implications for hundreds of other cases in the US.

item.title: 'I have no recollection of anything' - Epstein survivor says she was drugged and raped
item.description: A survivor of Epstein's abuses spoke publicly for the first time to BBC Newsnight about her experience of being raped and drugged by the sex offender.

item.title: Plane and firetruck removed from runway after LaGuardia crash
item.description: The wreckage blocked access to one of two runways at the busy New York City airport.

item.title: Russia bans Oscar-winning film 'Mr Nobody Against Putin'
item.description: A court alleges that the documentary promoted "negative attitudes" about the Russian government and the war in Ukraine.

item.title: Justice department and Trump ally Michael Flynn reach settlement over wrongful prosecution suit
item.description: Michael Flynn had sued the justice department claiming he was targeted because of his association with Trump's 2016 election campaign.

item.title: Trump accused of showing classified map to passengers on private flight
item.description: A 2023 memo also alleges that after leaving office, Trump retained another record so sensitive that only six people in the government had access to it.

item.title: Woman charged with shooting at Rihanna's home pleads not guilty to attempted murder
item.description: The 35-year-old from Florida remains detained in Los Angeles after the 8 March shooting.

item.title: Guthrie on missing mother: 'We cannot be at peace without knowing'
item.description: In her first interview since the disappearance, Savannah Guthrie recounts the moment she learned her mother was missing and wrestles with the idea that her fame may have made her mother a target.

item.title: First Lady Melania Trump arrives with humanoid robot at tech summit
item.description: The robot made an appearance with First Lady Melania Trump at the White House. Trump is hosting a summit on AI, education, and protecting kids in digital spaces.

item.title: What happened in the seconds before Air Canada plane crashed at LaGuardia
item.description: BBC Verify breaks down the moments before the deadly collision with a fire truck at the New York airport.

item.title: Dog rescued after falling into a 12-foot (3.6m) sinkhole
item.description: The yellow Labrador Retriever named Tessie was not injured in the fall or rescue, and is back in her yard after crews filled in the sinkhole.

item.title: 'Helpful' and 'scary': Travellers react to ICE agents at airports
item.description: Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have been deployed to US airports to assist TSA during the partial government shutdown.

item.title: Three charts that are warning signs flashing for Trump on Iran war
item.description: As gas prices rise, Trump's approval rating is heading into politically dangerous territory.

item.title: 'A game-changing moment for social media' - what next for big tech after landmark addiction verdict?
item.description: The ruling could be the beginning of the end of social media as we know it, writes the BBC's technology editor Zoe Kleinman.

item.title: Are the US and Iran holding peace talks, and what do both sides want?
item.description: There is indirect contact and channels between the two sides - but a deal may still be a long way off.

item.title: Ultimatums, diplomacy and a trip to Graceland as Trump eyes a deal with Iran
item.description: America may be a nation at war, but the president's activities have been a mix of diplomacy and diversions - with the occasional swing toward the surreal.

item.title: What we know about the LaGuardia Airport crash
item.description: Two pilots died after a passenger plane collided with a fire truck at New York's LaGuardia Airport.
